evidence_summary: Establish the formal elevation of john_carter from outsider to padwar through a high-scale military ceremony. The visual language must transition from the tension of his return to the grandeur of royal recognition within the zodanga_central_plaza.

Carter returns to Zodanga with the rescued scout. During a massive military ceremony in the plaza, Jeddak Than Kosis publicly honors Carter for his bravery, appointing him a *padwar* of the Guards and granting him quarters in the royal palace.
john_carter enters the crowded plaza with a rescued scout.
john_carter stands honored as a padwar within the palace grounds.
Public recognition and appointment of Carter by than_kosis.
